name: zutil_zar_write_section_blob
description: zUtil_ZAR::WriteSectionBlob forwards a section callback context, token, payload pointer, and payload size to the active manager's WriteSectionRecord.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?WriteSectionBlob@zUtil_ZAR@@YIHPAUzZbdSectionCallbackCtx@@PBDPBXI@Z at 0x4c0010 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 22 bytes and the VC object symbol is 32 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke verifies the forwarded write creates one HUD/TimerData record with the expected payload bytes, archive dirty flag, record count/capacity, file offset, and file size.
